memberdef.argsstring: (IJK_Field_double &vx, IJK_Field_double &vy, IJK_Field_double &vz, double v_imposed, const IJK_Interfaces &interfaces, double nb_diam, int upstream_dir, int gravity_dir, int upstream_stencil)
